home.hero_description: Pioneers of hydroponics in Senegal. We produce excellence (Premium Hot Pepper) in high-tech greenhouses to guarantee uncompromising quality.

hydroponics.title: Hydroponics
hydroponics.desc: Intensive cultivation in a 512m² greenhouse for optimal and pure yields.

transformation.title: Processing
transformation.desc: Premium valorization of peppers and fruits from our estate.

kiosks.title: Local Kiosks
kiosks.desc: Direct distribution through our own refrigerated network.

export.title: Export
export.desc: International "Zero Residue" standard for the global market.

home.innovation_description: With our first 512 m² production unit, we aim for unprecedented autonomy and production quality in Senegal:
home.production_record_desc: Target of 30 to 34 tonnes of hot pepper per cycle.
home.annual_cycles_desc: Constant production year-round, independent of climate hazards.
home.about_description: With our main operation located in Mboro, MBC is committed to providing products of exceptional quality. Led by Mr. Mor LO, our company masters the entire agricultural chain.
home.greenhouse_crops_desc: Diversity of crops cultivated in our high-tech hydroponic greenhouse
home.greenhouse_crops_list: Hot Pepper, Tomatoes, Cucumbers, Bell Peppers, Eggplants

about_page.subtitle: Pioneer of agro-industry 4.0 in Senegal, Makhamaat Business Corporation redefines the standards of vegetable and fruit production.
about_page.expertise_description: Our estate located in Mboro is the nerve center of our operational excellence. We combine cutting-edge agronomy with respect for the land.
about_page.commitment_subtitle: An alliance of trust, rigor and innovation to secure your supply chain.

quality.title: Proven Quality
quality.desc: We allow our partners to test our products before any commitment. Quality speaks for itself.

logistics.title: Reliability & Logistics
logistics.desc: Regular deliveries and consistent quality guaranteed year-round through our controlled transport flow.

proximity.title: Strategic Proximity
proximity.desc: Rigorous monitoring and continuous adaptation of our volumes to meet your most critical requirements.

services_page.subtitle: Makhamaat Business Corporation redefines agro-industry in Senegal through technical innovation and operational excellence.

hydroponics.title: Hydroponics & High-Performance Cultivation
hydroponics.desc: Operation of 512 m² greenhouses with cutting-edge technology for intensive and sustainable production (30-34 tonnes of pepper per cycle).

fruits.title: Fruit Diversification
fruits.desc: Premium production of papayas, lemon trees and soursop trees on our 3-hectare estate.

kiosks.title: Distribution & Refrigerated Kiosks
kiosks.desc: Direct sales through our future network of proprietary kiosks to guarantee absolute freshness and capture all added value.

export.title: Premium B2B Export
export.desc: Direct supply for hotels, restaurants and international wholesalers with "Zero Defect" quality standards.

services_page.focus_description: Our 512 m² hydroponic greenhouse is the spearhead of our modernization. With an exceptional yield of 15-17 kg per plant and production of 30-34 tonnes per cycle, we guarantee "Zero Residue" supply to the most rigorous export standards.

contact_page.subtitle: We are at your disposal for any partnership request, bulk order or information about our products.
contact_page.address:
Tivaouane Peulh, Darou Khoudoss
Dakar, Senegal
contact_page.success_message: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact_page.error_message: An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again.

footer.description: Makhamaat Business Corporation. Excellence in production, processing, purchase, sale and export of agricultural and agri-food products.
